title: See all tags and mentions across account

posts.author: willi (Willi Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want a widget that shows me all of my tags and mentions across multiple Docs and Board updates across multiple workspaces.

Note - this excludes tasks that are assigned to me

The “I was mentioned” widget and the “Inbox” widgets do not show tags from Docs. I also tried to search for tags in the Search and this did not show mentions from Board Updates nor tags from Docs

Screen Shot 2022-10-26 at 10.39.33 AM1810×1162 103 KB

Screen Shot 2022-10-26 at 10.07.08 AM879×709 33.6 KB

posts.author: barefootboxer (Tiffany)
posts.cookedHtml: It might also be nice to be able to compile a list of all mentions for a user - for an admin or custom role there are times when it could be helpful to see this information.
